---
title: "Lab 7: Testing"
subtitle: "Web Application Testing Patterns"
---

::: {.callout-important}
## Lab Information
**Assigned:** Friday, March 20, 2026
**Points:** 100
:::

## Overview

This lab introduces testing patterns and strategies for web applications.

## Learning Objectives

By completing this lab, you will:

1. Design **test strategies** for web applications
2. Implement **unit and integration tests**
3. Integrate **testing frameworks** (Jest, Cypress, etc.)
4. Handle **test-driven development workflows**

## Getting Started

Click the button below to accept the assignment and create your repository:

[Accept Lab 7 Assignment](https://classroom.github.com/a/muN768ZW){.btn .btn-primary}

## Prerequisites

- Completed Lab 6
- Understanding of web application architecture

## Getting Help

- **Office Hours:** Tuesday 9-11 AM, Pitt 2206
- **Webex:** Post questions with `lab7` tag
- **TA Sessions:** Check LMS for schedule
